channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Former New Mexico AG wants to step back into Epstein ranch investigations
item.description: Former New Mexico AG Hector Balderas says federal officials ignored his Epstein investigation and withheld records tied to Zorro Ranch allegations.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Defense Department identifies US service member killed in Iraq during 'controlled detonation' of Iranian drone
item.description: The Department of Defense identified the soldier killed on Sunday in northern Iraq during a "controlled detonation" of a downed Iranian attack drone.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US identifies soldier killed during controlled detonation of Iranian drone
item.description: Trump skips a dignified transfer at Dover as U.S.-Iran fighting enters day 10, with nearly 100 troops injured and no peace talks in sight.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane, tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tropical Storm Bertha strengthens, Gulf Coast flood risk grows
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha formed Monday evening and strengthened overnight in the Gulf, continuing to slowly organize as it tracks near the northern Gulf Coast, according to the National Hurricane Center (NHC).

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Preservationists claim old Eagle Lake schoolhouse slated for demolition qualifies for massive grants
item.description: A newly formed historical society is fighting to save the last historic building in Eagle Lake from a city plan to tear it down and build a new city hall complex.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] SPONSORED SEGMENT: The Way Concierge Medicine
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota County still needs poll workers for Aug. 18 primary

[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] How far north are Burmese pythons found in Florida? See range
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Taylor Farms still most likely source of cyclospora outbreak, FDA says

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TSA security to be privatized at Tampa International Airport under new federal program
item.description: Tampa International Airport will privatize most TSA operations, just months after Pres. Trump unveiled a 2027 budget proposal that called for handing more airport security over to private companies.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida judge to weigh whether James Fishback can remain on gubernatorial ballot
item.description: A closely watched legal battle over Florida’s race for governor begins Tuesday morning in Tallahassee, where a judge will hear arguments over whether James Fishback is eligible to serve as governor.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Arizona’s Republican primaries highlight party divide over Trump
item.description: Arizona Republicans vote in pivotal primaries for governor, Congress and key statewide offices as the party seeks a comeback in a key battleground state.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community
item.description: Affordable St. Pete produce market keeps prices down and boosts the community. Kelli Casto's Produce PAC supports area farmers and helps seniors in need.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Personal loans
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises comparing interest rates, borrowing only for necessary expenses and having a repayment plan before taking out a personal loan.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 21
item.description: Families desperate for answers after losing SNAP benefits to fraud. Plus, Pebble Creek rezoning case returns to public hearing.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Friends owe you money? Gen Z goes into debt covering group expenses, survey finds
item.description: A new Zelle report found 76% of Gen Z consumers who covered group expenses were never fully repaid, and nearly half say it pushed them into debt.

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Downtown Sarasota businesses reveal relocation progress
[WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] What to know about Tropical Storm Bertha
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] See spaghetti models, TS Bertha storm tracks
